extract: Linoone (Japanese: マッスグマ Massuguma) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It evolves from Zigzagoon starting at level 20. In Galar, Linoone has a dual-type Dark/Normal regional form. It evolves from Galarian Zigzagoon starting at level 20 and evolves into Obstagoon when leveled up starting at level 35 during the night. Hoennian Linoone is not known to evolve into any other Pokémon.
